ham.subject: Scheduled VPN Maintenance Notice - Thursday, March 28, 2026
ham.body:
Dear Team,

Please be advised that our corporate VPN will undergo scheduled maintenance on Thursday, March 28, 2026 from 10:00 AM to 12:00 PM PST. During this window, VPN connectivity will be unavailable.

We apologize for any inconvenience and appreciate your cooperation.

For any questions, contact IT support.

Thank you,
IT Operations Team

spam.subject: URGENT: Your Crypto Wallet Has Been Suspended
spam.body:
Dear User,

Due to recent suspicious activity detected on your crypto wallet, we have temporarily suspended access to protect your assets. To reactivate your wallet, please verify your identity by clicking the link below:

<URL>

Failure to verify within 24 hours will result in permanent suspension. If you believe this is a mistake, contact support immediately.

Best regards,
Security Team
